title: Season Match
description:
REMEDIUM: SENTINELS - УЖЕ В ПРОДАЖЕ!

SCHOLAR OF THE ARCANE ARTS - УЖЕ В РАННЕМ ДОСТУПЕ

Об игре
The story of Season Match starts when the Snow Queen has her magic mirror broken, and decides to make cold winter stay forever in the fairy-land. You will set out on a legendary journey to find the pieces of the broken mirror, put them together and beat the Snow Queen. 

• Four seasons

• Over 250 missions

• Fantastic characters

• Easy-to-Play for all ages

• Learn-as-you-play tutorial

• Awesome music
description_short: The story of Season Match starts when the Snow Queen has her magic mirror broken, and decides to make cold winter stay forever in the fairy-land. You will set out on a legendary journey to find the pieces of the broken mirror, put them together and beat the Snow Queen.
